code:
graph LR
    1:startevent:((startevent)) --> 2:task:(Send Invitations)
    2:task: --> 3:task:(Find out which games to play)
    3:task: --> 4:task:(Appoint a date for LAN party)
    4:task: --> 5:exclusivegateway:{x}
    5:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |8 or more agree| 6:task:(Check if all games are available)
    5:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |Less than 8 agree| 4:task:
    6:task: --> 7:exclusivegateway:{x}
    7:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |All games are available| 8:task:(Find out beer requirement)
    7:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |Some games are missing| 9:task:(Download missing games)
    9:task: --> 8:task:
    8:task: --> 10:exclusivegateway:{x}
    10:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |Enough beer available| 11:endevent:((endevent))
    10:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |Not enough beer| 12:task:(Buy missing beer)
    12:task: --> 11:endevent:((endevent))
repo_description: Generate Prompts from Mermaid, Graphviz, and BPMN2

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个LAN派对的组织流程图。先从发送邀请开始，然后要确定玩什么游戏，再约个具体日期。
elements_involved: Find out which games to play
Appoint a date for LAN party

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 明白，这三个步骤是顺序执行的。那约完日期之后呢？需要有个判断节点来决定能不能继续推进吧？
elements_involved: Appoint a date for LAN party

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，这里要加一个排他网关。如果8人及以上同意，就进入检查游戏环节；如果少于8人同意，就得回到重新约日期的步骤。
elements_involved: Check if all games are available
Appoint a date for LAN party

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 好的，我已经把人数判断的网关加进去了，包括两条分支路径。那检查完游戏之后呢？
elements_involved: Check if all games are available

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 检查游戏之后还要再分一次。如果所有游戏都有了，直接去统计啤酒需求；如果有些游戏没有，得先下载缺失的游戏，然后再去统计啤酒。
清楚了，下载游戏的任务会汇合到统计啤酒需求那里。那啤酒这部分怎么处理？
最后再来一个网关判断啤酒够不够。如果够了就直接结束；不够的话要去买啤酒，买完再结束。
好的，整个流程已经完整了：发送邀请→确定游戏→约日期→人数判断→检查游戏→（可能下载游戏）→统计啤酒→啤酒判断→（可能买啤酒）→结束。三个排他网关和两个结束汇合点都处理好了。
elements_involved: Find out which games to play
Appoint a date for LAN party
Check if all games are available
